introSection: The Great Pumpkin Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Kings Island in Mason, Ohio, USA. This ride is the same as The Great Pumpkin Coaster at Kings Dominion.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride first opened as Scooby Zoom in 1992. Its station was built under the cover previously used as the loading area for Smurf's Enchanted Voyage.

The ride was renamed Top Cat's Taxi Jam in 1998 to fit the Top Cat cartoons. It had six cars, decorated to look like five cabs and one police car following.

It was then renamed Little Bill's Giggle Coaster in 2006 to fit in with the 1999 children's show Little Bill.

The ride was renamed Great Pumpkin Coaster in 2010.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Purple track and supports. Used to feature blue rails with red ties and yellow supports when it operated as Taxi Jam.

fullText:
The Great Pumpkin Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Kings Island in Mason, Ohio, USA. This ride is the same as The Great Pumpkin Coaster at Kings Dominion.

The ride first opened as Scooby Zoom in 1992. Its station was built under the cover previously used as the loading area for Smurf's Enchanted Voyage.

The ride was renamed Top Cat's Taxi Jam in 1998 to fit the Top Cat cartoons. It had six cars, decorated to look like five cabs and one police car following.

It was then renamed Little Bill's Giggle Coaster in 2006 to fit in with the 1999 children's show Little Bill.

The ride was renamed Great Pumpkin Coaster in 2010.



Purple track and supports. Used to feature blue rails with red ties and yellow supports when it operated as Taxi Jam.
